overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera moves past neon-lit storefronts, examines a damaged vehicle, and crosses intersections with pedestrians carrying umbrellas in a high-fidelity game engine environment.

A yellow taxi passes by on the street as the camera approaches a crosswalk. The NCPD police station building is visible across the street with its distinctive circular signage.

The camera moves across the wet asphalt toward the opposite sidewalk, with futuristic buildings visible ahead through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk street that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit intersection. It begins by moving past a modern building with slatted facades and palm trees, while futuristic street lamps reflect off the wet concrete as a green muscle car and black sedan pass by. As the camera navigates around a large tree planter, the view opens up to reveal a damaged silver sports car parked on the sidewalk and a pedestrian in a purple jacket approaching from the opposite direction. The scene then shifts focus as the camera circles the wrecked vehicle to examine its front-end damage and decals, while the background expands to show pedestrians with colorful umbrellas. Finally, the perspective widens further to reveal the DYNALUX storefront and glowing digital billboards looming in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rainy cyberpunk street that transitions from a crowded sidewalk to a crossing of a wide, wet intersection. It begins by gliding past a green neon DYNALUX sign and a throng of pedestrians with colorful umbrellas, while a yellow taxi passes by on the street. As the camera approaches the crosswalk, the NCPD police station and its circular signage come into view across the road. The scene then shifts as the camera turns to cross the yellow-striped pavement, passing a couple under a purple umbrella while a green car drives through the intersection. Finally, the movement carries the viewer across the shimmering wet asphalt toward the opposite sidewalk, where futuristic buildings loom through the falling rain.
